root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.operate_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as operate_date, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no) as member_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as group_control_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) as group_name, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value, sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_amount, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, si_security_user.user_name, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.share_value ) as thai_share_value FROM sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, si_security_user WHERE ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.item_type = 'TL' ) and ( si_security_user.user_id = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.entry_id )) /*WHERE*/ -- sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no = '000515'
